title: Honestly, the Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 Plays It a Little Too Safe
summary: The Galaxy Watch 8 and Galaxy Watch Ultra use the same Samsung Exynos W1000 as the Galaxy Watch 7. The upgraded processor will power new AI-powered wellness features on the Galaxy Watch 9 and the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2.
caption: output/2026-07-23/honestly-the-samsung-galaxy-watch-9-plays-it-a-little-too-safe.txt
